mission.title: falco: [Tracking] Opening multiple event sources in the same Falco instance
mission.description: [Tracking] Opening multiple event sources in the same Falco instance. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current falco deployment
steps.description:
Verify your falco version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
helm list -n falco 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working falco installation.

steps.title: Review falco configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant falco configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
kubectl get configmap -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=falco
```
# Motivation

The plugin system allows Falco to open new kinds of event sources that go beyond the historical syscall use case.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Tracking] Opening multiple event sources in the same Falco…
steps.description:
I'm gonna share the thought process that led me to the proposed solution documented in the issue description.  has been involved in the early discussion of this topic.

Since the end goal is to run multiple sources at the same time, many execution models have been hypothesized, but each of them has been discarded in favor of the proposed solution. I'm gonna proceed and document briefly their design and cost/benefits tradeoffs.

- **(H1)** Single-threaded model, with multiple event sources

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco
kubectl get events -n falco --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Tracking] Opening multiple event sources in the same Falco…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I'm gonna share the thought process that led me to the proposed solution documented in the issue description.  has been involved in the early discussion of this topic.

Since the end goal is to run multiple sources at the same time, many execution models have been hypothesized, but each of them has been discarded in favor of the proposed solution.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with falco installed or the issue environment reproducible.
